de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Class DefaultConstructor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.DefaultConstructor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ClassTypeContainer, Constructor, Member, Method, ProgramModelElement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
    Deprecated. 
    is actually never used

    @Deprecated
public class DefaultConstructor
extends Object
implements Constructor
    Default constructor of class types.

      • DefaultConstructor

        @Deprecated
public DefaultConstructor(String name,
                             boolean parentIsPublic)
        Deprecated. 
        Create a new default constructor for the given class type. The name of the constructor is set appropriately.
        Parameters:
        name - of the Constructor
        parentIsPublic - is set true iff the parent is declared public.
